note: MemVfs in-process; SP112 snapshot isolation; tables=10, rows/tbl=100000; txn = Op::Txn{ops} — RO bracket routes via sm.read().read_only_op (SP-Perf-A-TXN-RO bypass: no write lock; workers run in parallel against committed state); RW bracket SPLIT-PHASE (SP-Perf-A-TXN-RW): read prefix via sm.read().read_only_op (parallel), write suffix via sm.write().apply (serial). Read-after-write Txns fall through to unified apply (V1 limit; future TXN-RW-RYW). WO bracket unchanged (apply-only). inner-ops/txn ≈ 410.0; reported ops/sec = transactions/sec
